name: anomaly-tool-heuristic-not-gate
description: AnomalyCheckTool wraps the deterministic anomaly_detector as a tool for the Bug Analyst — a cheap first-pass hint, not a verdict or gate. The analyst is forced to call it at step 1 (agents.py's force_at_step=1) but is free to disagree with its output.
invariants: The tool description must keep framing the result as a heuristic hint so the analyst still judges the raw output itself
contracts: Returns repr() of AnomalySignals.to_dict() over the two raw JSON inputs
